headline: Preferred Bank And 2 Other Dividend Stocks To Boost Your Portfolio
summary: The United States market remained flat over the last week, yet it has shown a robust 24% rise over the past 12 months with earnings projected to grow by 19% annually. In such dynamic conditions, dividend stocks like Preferred Bank can offer stability and income potential, making them an attractive option for investors aiming to enhance their portfolios.

headline: Accenture downgraded by Morgan Stanley as AI spending crowds out IT service demand
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley downgraded Accenture to Equal-weight from Overweight and slashed its price target to $177 from $240, arguing that the anticipated boost to IT services spending from artificial intelligence investments has yet to materialize as enterprises continue to prioritize AI projects over traditional discretionary technology spending.

content.title: Accenture downgraded by Morgan Stanley as AI spending crowds out IT service demand
content.summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley downgraded Accenture to Equal-weight from Overweight and slashed its price target to $177 from $240, arguing that the anticipated boost to IT services spending from artificial intelligence investments has yet to materialize as enterprises continue to prioritize AI projects over traditional discretionary technology spending.

headline: Accenture (ACN) Stock After 44% Slide Are Cash Flows Pointing To A Rebound?
summary: Are you wondering whether Accenture's recent weakness has left the stock mispriced, or if the current level fairly reflects the risks you care about? headline: Stocks Set to Open Sharply Higher as Oil Sinks on U.S.-Iran Deal, Fed Meeting Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +1.22%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.99% this morning, pointing to a sharply higher open on Wall Street as oil prices sank after the U.S. and Iran reached an interim peace deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
